# Alias Reference Data

## Purpose

Stores Tier 2 multilingual terminology and alias data used for name resolution and entity disambiguation.

## Examples of Sources That Belong Here

- genshin-langdata dictionary files (EN/JA/zhCN/zhTW mappings)
- Processed alias indices
- Pronunciation/romanization data

## Allowed Use

- Alias resolution (finding all names for one entity)
- Multilingual terminology mapping
- Agent name disambiguation
- Pronunciation lookup
- Tag/category mapping

## Disallowed Use

- Lore evidence
- Canon proof
- source_evidence_id
- Claim mapping evidence
- Status upgrades

## Note

Not canon by itself. Dictionary entries are `alias_reference` — they tell you what something is called, not what it means in lore.
